subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! The Wronged One of the horizons enjoineth thee and the other handmaidens to preserve the Covenant. By My life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مظلوم آفاق تو را و سایر اماء را بحفظ میثاق وصیت میفرماید لعمری
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
